calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner Sonia Maritza Garcia Torres was present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the minor Jeremy Antonio Garcia Torres, placed under oath and examined.
Copy of the minor's birth certificate which does not list a father's name is in the court file.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minor to Jeremy Garcia Garcia.
Decree Changing Name of the minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
